nodes.label: UEM Icon Set: Device Management, Security, Cross-Device Enrollment, Compliance Checklist
nodes.description: A set of four blue-toned flat/isometric icons on a transparent background representing core UEM (Unified Endpoint Management) concepts: (1) a 3D hexagon/cube with a gear symbolizing device configuration or settings management; (2) a shield with a key and checkmark symbolizing security and access control; (3) a mobile phone and desktop monitor with an Apple logo and sync arrows symbolizing cross-device (mobile + desktop) enrollment and management; (4) a clipboard/checklist with checkboxes and a checkmark symbolizing compliance auditing or policy checklists.
